name: TransitionJourney
description: The individual's current operational position during Phase Five (Transition Partnership). Living document — refreshed every interaction. This is what Smudge reads to resume a conversation seamlessly. Stores WHERE the individual is, not a log of what they've done.

user_profile_id.description: Links to UserProfile — the individual whose journey this is

partnership_state.description: Partnership lifecycle state machine. INDEPENDENT is terminal — if user returns, a new journey begins.

transition_status.description: Current operational position — employment, training, applications, interviews. This is where the individual IS, not a log of what they've done.

interviews.description: Upcoming or recent interviews — current positional status

current_direction.description: Carried from Phase Four — the individual's chosen pathway/direction

active_commitments.description: User-owned commitments. Not promises to Smudge — commitments to themselves that Smudge helps them remember, review and revise without judgement.

description.description: The commitment in the user's own words

status.description: No failure-oriented terminology. PAUSED = circumstances changed temporarily. REVISED = updated. NO_LONGER_RELEVANT = direction shifted.

target_date.description: Optional — only if user sets one

revised_from.description: Previous commitment description if status is REVISED

current_blockers.description: Current obstacles. Positional, not historical. What's in the way right now.

confidence_band.description: Behavioural confidence band — NOT a numeric score. Smudge identifies movement between bands from conversation, not calculation.

confidence_trend.description: Movement direction between confidence bands, derived from checkpoint comparison.

wellbeing_awareness.description: Awareness state only. No diagnosis, no scoring, no clinical interpretation. Only populated if the individual has voluntarily shared something significant.

observation.description: What was voluntarily shared — Smudge's record, not a clinical assessment

awareness.description: NONE = nothing noted. NOTED = Smudge should be aware of this in conversation.

significant_milestones.description: Achieved milestones — for showing progress, not measuring performance

referral_history.description: Referrals made to external organisations. Smudge decides when to refer, engine records.

operational_readiness.description: Engine's assessment of current operational position. Partnership language, not judgement.

last_interaction_date.description: When Smudge last spoke with the user

next_check_in_date.description: Optional — when the next check-in should happen (Smudge's judgement)

conclusion_summary.description: How the individual transitioned to independence (if concluded)
